summary: Completed testing of Iteration 9 features: 0-100 odds scale, info tooltips, Playing XI endpoint, and venue fetch endpoint. All features working correctly. Backend accepts new field names (market_pct_team1/team2), frontend shows correct placeholders (e.g. 55), 10 info tooltips visible on consultation results page, Playing XI returns luck_factor per player, venue fetch endpoint returns data.
passed_tests: GET /api/ returns version 4.0.0
POST /api/matches/{id}/consult accepts market_pct_team1/market_pct_team2 (0-100 values)
POST /api/matches/{id}/consult returns correct edge calculation (model 68.5% vs market 55% = +13.5% edge)
POST /api/matches/{id}/consult returns bookmaker_pct_team1/team2 in odds_detail
POST /api/matches/{id}/chat accepts market_pct_team1/market_pct_team2 (0-100 values)
POST /api/matches/{id}/chat returns consultation_summary with win_probability and edge_pct
POST /api/matches/{id}/beta-predict accepts market_team1_pct/market_team2_pct (0-100 values)
POST /api/matches/{id}/fetch-live accepts betting_team1_pct/betting_team2_pct (0-100 values)
POST /api/matches/{id}/playing-xi returns team1_xi and team2_xi with 11 players each
POST /api/matches/{id}/playing-xi returns luck_factor (0.85-1.15 range) on each player
GET /api/cricket-api/venue/{venue_name} returns venue data with api_info
Frontend market odds inputs have placeholder 'e.g. 55' (0-100 format)
Frontend market odds inputs have min=0, max=100, step=1
Frontend shows 'BOOKMAKER WIN % (0-100)' label
Frontend ConsultantDashboard sends market_pct_team1/market_pct_team2 to backend
Frontend shows 10 info tooltips after consultation results load
Info tooltip on Algorithm Prediction explains 5 weighted factors
Info tooltip on Risk Tolerance explains betting styles
Info tooltip on Bookmaker Win % explains 0-100 scale
Info tooltip on Win Probability Gauge explains 6-layer decision engine
Info tooltip on Edge explains model vs market probability
Info tooltip on Simulations explains 10K negative binomial
Info tooltip on Top Drivers explains key prediction factors
Info tooltip on Player Impact explains weighted formula with luck biasness
Info tooltip on Match State explains live features
Win Probability Gauge displays correctly
Edge Meter shows AVOID-EDGE-VALUE scale with percentage
Value Signal Badge shows STRONG_VALUE when edge > 8%
Simulation Summary shows 10,000 simulations with team probabilities
Top Drivers panel shows prediction factors
Player Impact panel shows predicted runs/wickets per player
Match State panel shows phase and metrics
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing match ipl2026_007 (CSK vs PBKS)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features fully working. Key changes: (1) Backend endpoints now accept 0-100 probability scale instead of decimal odds - field names are market_pct_team1/team2 for consult/chat, market_team1_pct/team2_pct for beta-predict, betting_team1_pct/team2_pct for fetch-live. (2) Playing XI endpoint returns luck_factor (0.85-1.15) per player. (3) Venue fetch endpoint uses CricketData.org API. (4) Frontend has 10 info tooltips explaining all prediction models and metrics.
